description: M4 audit finding F3 (issue #405): `checker-arity.ts` collects each `struct`'s constructor arity (required = max = field count) at phase 1, so the 2-field `point`'s bare `point 3` under-supply raises `ol-not-enough-inputs` statically, mirroring the runtime constructor-arity check (issue #329) one stage earlier.
